channel.name: Orthanc to OpenEMR
channel.description: Polls Orthanc REST API for new DICOM studies and sends HL7 v2 ORU^R01 notifications to OpenEMR. Triggered by TAC scan events from plc_tac via gizmo-brain.py and send_dicom.py.

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Extract study metadata
Build HL7 ORU^R01 — DICOM study reference
Build FHIR ImagingStudy resource
